projectDescription: A Claude Code skill for reading, searching, and sending iMessages and emails on macOS using local SQLite databases and AppleScript.
keyFeatures: Recent Activity — see who texted or emailed you with message previews and unread counts
Conversation Reader — read full iMessage and email history for any contact
Message Search — full-text search across all iMessage conversations and Apple Mail
Attachment Finder — find photos, videos, PDFs, and other files from messages and emails
Mail Reader — browse, search, and read Apple Mail emails directly
Send Messages — send iMessages and emails via AppleScript with confirmation prompt
Parallel subagents — contact resolution and cross-source searches run in parallel for performance
Runs entirely locally — no message data sent to external services
